title: AdaptiveWeapons
description: An action-packed mod that amplifies sword combat with a combo system
body:
An action-packed mod that amplifies sword combat with a combo system. The more hits you land, the stronger the abilities you'll unlock! With each combo achievement, you receive special effects to intensify the battle and make it more rewarding. Ideal for players who enjoy fast-paced combat!

Mod Features:
Combo System: Accumulate combos using continuous hits to trigger high-powered abilities!
Special Effects: Lightning bolts, explosion, strength increase, recovery, and ultimate attack!
Warden Slayer: Tailored mechanics created to assist against stronger mobs such as the Warden.
Dynamic Fighting: Every battle gets more intense as you execute more combos!

Buffs for Players:
Combo 3: Speed
Combo 5: Strength
Combo 10: Lightning Strike
Combo 15: Explosion
Combo 25: Strength II
Combo 40: Freezing the enemy
Combo 60: Healing
Combo 80: Enemy will get knockback
Combo 100: Lightning bolts with Effects


Client-Side or Server-Side?
This mod is client side + Server side
  Since This mod affects only combat mechanics, this mod needs to be installed on server-side
  for multiplayer.
However, it does not modify rendering or HUD elements, so it doesn’t require a client-side installation if used in multiplayer.
For singleplayer: Works perfectly fine when installed via Fabric modloader in .minecraft/mods.
